request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that communities with strong civil defense programs report 40% fewer emergency response delays? Our neighbors in [State] saw response times drop by an average of 2.3 minutes after implementing basic preparedness measures. This isn't about fear - it's about responsible citizenship. When we take preparedness seriously, we're not just protecting ourselves, we're upholding our duty to community and country. #PreparednessMatters #DutyFirst
